title: Starmer Watch — Pressure Index
description: Composite pressure index, top news, and market signals for Keir Starmer's leadership.

items.title: Pressure Index 58/100 (elevated)
items.content_text: Public pressure bloc is above the modeled 81 MP trigger. Pressure Index 58/100 (elevated). Polymarket's top Starmer-exit signal is 11.5%.

items.title: Bluesky · @stephenkb.bsky.social: Case in point. One of my neighbours asked me if Keir Starmer was going to go. I said, yeah, it was just a matter of time. They replied that it would be a shame not to have the prime minister as our MP anymore and then...
